title: gdk/gdk_bat.c:2855: BATassertHeadProps: Assertion `!b->H->revsorted || cmp >= 0' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE FLOAT8_TBL(f1 DOUBLE NOT NULL CHECK (f1 >= -1000 AND f1 <= 1000));
SELECT sign(f1) as sign_f1 FROM FLOAT8_TBL WHERE f1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure on sorted comparison of float values
